name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: CSS brace crash fix
release_notes: Fixes the v0.6.96 startup crash caused by unescaped CSS braces in the project selection card styling.
notes: Fixes the v0.6.96 startup crash caused by unescaped CSS braces in the project selection card styling.
Retains the Home branding cleanup, visible project due-date cards, and focus-based support-block hierarchy from v0.6.96.
Retains the Tasklist and Spending Plan fallback diagnostics added after the section-opening errors.
